conditions: Light anaerobic and dark aerobic; acetate, succinate, malate, butyrate, p-coumarate, benzoate/aromatic; ammonium and nitrogen-fixing; at least two light intensities
measurement_fields: protein_id; gene_id; condition; abundance_molecules_per_cell_or_fmol_per_ug; calibration_method; CV; growth_phase; OD; growth_rate
model_use: Enzyme capacity upper bounds and protein pool constraints
acceptance_notes: Prefer absolute abundance; LFQ acceptable only as relative prior with sensitivity bands

conditions: CBB, nitrogenase, photosynthetic reaction center/electron transport, acetate assimilation, aromatic degradation, PHB, TCA/glyoxylate
measurement_fields: EC; gene; reaction_id; substrate; kcat; organism; temperature; pH; source; confidence_tier
acceptance_notes: Use organism-specific values first; otherwise mark ortholog-derived and run 10x sensitivity

conditions: Acetate, succinate, malate/butyrate, p-coumarate/benzoate under matched light/oxygen/nitrogen regimes
measurement_fields: labeling_substrate; atom_enrichment; timepoints; extracellular rates; isotopomer data; fitted fluxes; confidence intervals
model_use: Internal flux validation and FVA acceptance ranges
acceptance_notes: Flux ratios must validate branch usage, not just growth

conditions: All model-validation substrates; PHB/H2 target conditions; CO2-open and CO2-closed variants
measurement_fields: substrate_uptake; acetate/organic acid secretion; CO2; H2; NH4/N2; PHB; biomass dry weight; light intensity; OD
model_use: Condition-specific exchange bounds and objective tradeoff validation
acceptance_notes: Do not invent bounds when measured rates are absent

measurement_fields: metabolite_id; concentration; unit; compartment_assumption; extraction_method; pH; temperature; confidence_interval
model_use: Metabolite concentration bounds for deltaG constraints
acceptance_notes: Absolute concentrations strongly preferred; relative metabolomics cannot hard-constrain TFA alone

conditions: Carbon and nitrogen source matrix; aerobic/dark, anaerobic/light, photoautotrophic/mixotrophic
measurement_fields: growth_rate; max_OD; lag; substrate; electron donor; nitrogen source; oxygen; light; medium
model_use: Phenotype benchmark comparable to BisA53-style model validation
acceptance_notes: Include negative controls and substrate-only versus co-substrate controls

conditions: Multiple photon flux densities under acetate and aromatic substrates
measurement_fields: light_intensity; spectrum; growth_rate; uptake; H2; PHB; pigment/protein markers
acceptance_notes: Report geometry and measured irradiance at culture surface

conditions: Mo/V/Fe nitrogenase-relevant media; ammonium repression controls
measurement_fields: acetylene reduction or N2 fixation proxy; H2; ammonium; metal availability; gene/protein abundance
model_use: Constrain nitrogenase and redox sink alternatives
acceptance_notes: Separate nitrogenase H2 from fermentative/other H2 routes
